_doc: Frozen real-feature cache manifest for the CSC real-EEG validation (pre-reg v4). DRY-RUN package; no tag, no validation run. The cache itself is not committed (rebuildable by build_lee2019_b3_cache.py); this manifest pins its provenance and the frozen feature pipeline.

provenance.trial_count_table: held inside LEE2019_B3_metadata.json (trial_counts_by_subject_session_class); covered by cache_metadata_sha256
provenance.note_source_files: per-file path/size/parser recorded in LEE2019_B3_metadata.json.source_files; the 61 GB raw .mat are not hashed (path+size+parser recorded); the CACHE sha256 above must be verified before any certifier executes.

run_time_verification_required: cache_sha256 matches provenance.cache_sha256 (or cache is rebuilt from builder_sha256 and re-verified)
channel_names == channels (exact, ordered); no substitute channel
